response.justification: The candidate is an experienced, versatile senior engineer with strong software craftsmanship, testing discipline, and some high-throughput systems exposure, but the profile does not match a Principal IC6 role focused on growth and experimentation systems. There is no evidence of building experimentation platforms, feature-flagging, telemetry/metrics infrastructure, or statistical analysis work, and no demonstrated principal-level scope such as leading multi-workstream initiatives or architecting systems adopted across many teams. The seniority trajectory (Senior/Staff at small-to-mid companies) falls short of the cross-org technical leadership this role requires.
strengths: 15+ years of broad engineering experience across web, backend, embedded, and mobile with polyglot proficiency (TypeScript, Java, C#, C/C++, DLang)
Real high-scale systems exposure: low-latency microservices handling millions of HTTP requests per second at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic
Strong engineering fundamentals: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, plus recent AI-agent tooling (MCP code generators) experience
concerns: No experimentation, A/B testing, feature-flagging, or growth-measurement platform experience — the core domain of the role
No evidence of metrics/telemetry infrastructure or statistical analysis aptitude required for experimentation quality work
No demonstrated principal-level leadership: no multi-team initiatives, org-wide platform ownership, or mentoring at scale

key_factors.factor: Seniority gap vs Principal IC6 scope
Strong general engineering breadth and scale exposure
